description: CLI for managing Snagit capture files (.snagx format)

list.usage_instructions: List all .snagx capture files in the captures folder. Use --path/-p to specify a custom folder (default is the standard Snagit captures directory). Use --table/-t for formatted output.

view.help: Extract a .snagx capture file and output the path to the main image. Extracts the .snagx archive and outputs the path to the main PNG image. The extracted files are kept in a temp directory for viewing.
view.usage_instructions: Extract a .snagx file and get the path to its main PNG image. FILENAME is required (positional) — can be just the filename or full path. Use --path/-p to specify captures folder. Extracted files are kept in a temp directory.

export.help: Export the main PNG image from a .snagx capture file. Extracts only the main PNG image from the .snagx archive. If no output path is specified, saves to current directory with capture name.
export.usage_instructions: Export the main PNG from a .snagx capture. FILENAME is required (positional). Use --output/-o to specify output path (defaults to ./<filename>.png). Use --path/-p for captures folder. Use --table/-t for formatted output.

capture.usage_instructions: Manage .snagx capture files: list all captures, view extracted images, and export PNGs. All commands accept --path/-p to override the default captures folder location.

usage_instructions: Use for managing Snagit screen capture files (.snagx format). Commands follow `snagit capture <action>` pattern. List captures, view extracted images, and export PNGs from .snagx archives. Most commands accept --path/-p to specify a custom captures folder.
